channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dirty clothes in the side entrance of St Vincent House, near the communal staircase of more than 5 days, 24th March
item.description:
Dirty clothes in the side entrance of St Vincent House, near the communal staircase of more than 5 days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fendall Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green bin bag, 24th March
item.description:
Been left on pathway for over a week sack of rubbish
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ascot Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish outside 533 Lordship Lane, 24th March
item.description:
Fly tipping outside front of 533 Lordship Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Streamline Mews, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of littering left on this corner for weeks, 24th March
item.description:
Please clean up this corner over the fence \ plants. It has been full of litter for a while.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Upper Clapton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous Oxide canister, 24th March
item.description:
A large nitrous oxide canister has been discarde on the edge od our property, undee our tree in the divide.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Canisters, 24th March
item.description:
These have been here for weeks. Opposite the church and circa no. 60’ fountayne Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fountayne Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grafitti facing road on side of Urban Village and apartment block - 121 Denmark Hill, 24th March
item.description:
We have had more graffiti on 121 Denmark Hill. It is facing the road and negatively impacting the business of Urban Village and residents of the apartment block. Please may you remove this

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 121, Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Same as usual, number 13, 24th March
item.description:
A wardrobe has appeared outside no. 13 harvist road. Is it the occupier or someone flytipping to this exact spot on a weekly basis? Any help to stop this appreciate as its very unsightly. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dalyell Road, Stockwell, Greater London

item.title: Fly-tipping in Cooks Hole Road., 24th March
item.description:
Large pile of building materials and rubbish illegally dumped on the edge of Hilly Fields park br Cooks Hole Road. Includes paperwork that could help identify culprit.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cooks Hole Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
